/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/tools/water3d_backend_compare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke_sim_advection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke_sim_boundaries.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke_sim_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke_sim_forces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke_sim_pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke_sim_pressure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke_sim_sampling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_grid_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/pressure_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/pressure_solver3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_water_sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_water3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_smoke3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/mac_coupled_sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Water3DBackendCompare.dir/Sim/text_mask.cpp.o -o Water3DBackendCompare
